since_last: 30% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.44%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.52% · BTC -2.69% · Gold -1.23% · Nasdaq100 -3.07%. 30% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.44%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.44%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -12.09%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +4.50%, NOW +3.90%, SAP +3.75%, IBM +3.41%, MGNI +2.72%. Laggards: MU -12.09%, VRT -9.02%, LRCX -8.98%, MRVL -8.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.07% at $151.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
